theme.description: A high-contrast, function-first, and highly accessible Swiss Brutalist aesthetic. Emphasizes authority and clarity. 95% of the UI is monochrome to reduce cognitive load during focused tasks like interviewing and resume reviewing, with one sharp accent color for actionable elements.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Use mono font for ATS scores, timers, and code-like elements.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind Scale: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12)
spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

widget_rules: Primary charts: col-span-2 row-span-2 or col-span-3

rules: Mobile-First: Always start with grid-cols-1.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Every pixel utilized in the dashboard. Use h-full on children.
F-Pattern Information Architecture: Top-left quadrant for North Star Metric (e.g., Average ATS Score or Streak).

dashboard_cards.style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) or Sharp Edges, Cardless
rules: Expose the skeleton. Make the grid visible.
Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop shadows.
On hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens or brightens depending on mode.
If content scrolls under: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 with 1px delicate bottom inner stroke.
Must include toggle for sidebar.

libraries: shadcn/ui (Base primitives: Dialog, Dropdown, Table, Tabs)

customizations.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm), high contrast. Text color explicitly set on hover.
customizations.inputs: 1px solid border, sharp corners, distinct focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary).
customizations.charts: Accessible color palettes, color-blind friendly. Use text labels instead of just color for status.
customizations.sidebar: Collapsible left-sidebar. High contrast active state for current route.

rules: Hover states on all interactive elements.
Always explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-white hover:text-black).
Staggered entrance animations for lists (e.g., recent interview attempts).
Micro-interactions: Button press scale down (scale-95).
Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark background with colorful light streaks
Dynamic black and white abstract geometric pattern

rules: Never use placeholder URLs.
Apply bg-black/50 or bg-white/40 overlays to hero images to ensure text contrast if text is placed on them.

specific_views.auth: Split screen layout. Left side: Abstract dark background with light streaks and brief value prop. Right side: Minimalist login/signup form, sharp borders.
specific_views.dashboard: Top left: Current Streak and Avg Score (North Star). Control Room Grid. Line chart for scores over time. Radar chart for weak areas (DSA, HR, Core). List of recent attempts.
specific_views.resume_analyzer: Split view. Left: PDF upload zone with generous padding and dashed border. Right: ATS score dial (circular progress), missing keywords chips, improvement suggestions.
specific_views.mock_interview: Focus mode. Minimalist header. Left sidebar collapses. Main area: Large centered question (Cabinet Grotesk), Mono font timer, wide text area for answer. Followed by AI evaluation score in stark contrasting color.
